commentsOverrides: @fluidframework/test-utils>mocha: dropped here because this workspace only loads test-utils' primary export at runtime (see test-version-utils/src/testApi.ts) — it never invokes the legacy test-utils' bundled test runner. Removing mocha eliminates serialize-javascript@6.0.2 (GHSA-5c6j-r48x-rmvq) which would otherwise be pulled in transitively across all back-compat versions of @fluidframework/test-utils.
